testcase.name: test_register_and_me
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:24: in test_register_and_me r = s1.get(f"{API}/auth/me"); assert r.status_code == 200 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_game_and_list

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:38: in test_create_game_and_list assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_tournament_insufficient
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:45: in test_create_tournament_insufficient r = s1.post(f"{API}/tournaments", json={"game_id": pytest.game_id, "stake_amount": 100, "max_players": 4, "start_time": "2026-12-31T10:00:00Z"}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'pytest' has no attribute 'game_id'

testcase.name: test_seed_wallet_and_create_tournament
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:50: in test_seed_wallet_and_create_tournament r = s1.post(f"{API}/tournaments", json={"game_id": pytest.game_id, "stake_amount": 0, "max_players": 4, "start_time": "2026-12-31T10:00:00Z"}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'pytest' has no attribute 'game_id'

testcase.name: test_list_tournaments

failure.message: assert False + where False = any(<generator object test_list_tournaments.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xf94e524024d0>)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:56: in test_list_tournaments assert any(t["id"] == pytest.tournament_id for t in r.json()) E assert False E + where False = any(<generator object test_list_tournaments.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xf94e524024d0>)

testcase.name: test_join_tournament
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:59: in test_join_tournament r = s2.post(f"{API}/tournaments/{pytest.tournament_id}/join") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'pytest' has no attribute 'tournament_id'

testcase.name: test_tournament_details
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:63: in test_tournament_details r = s1.get(f"{API}/tournaments/{pytest.tournament_id}") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'pytest' has no attribute 'tournament_id'

testcase.name: test_chat
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:68: in test_chat r = s1.post(f"{API}/chat", json={"tournament_id": pytest.tournament_id, "message": "hi"}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'pytest' has no attribute 'tournament_id'

testcase.name: test_complete_tournament
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:76: in test_complete_tournament r = s1.post(f"{API}/tournaments/{pytest.tournament_id}/complete", params={"winner_user_id": users["u2"]["id"]}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'pytest' has no attribute 'tournament_id'

testcase.name: test_only_creator_can_complete

testcase.name: test_wallet_status_pending
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:99: in test_wallet_status_pending r = s1.get(f"{API}/wallet/deposit/status/{pytest.session_id}") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'pytest' has no attribute 'session_id'
